description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the getLog function in svnlook.php in WebSVN before 2.3.1 allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the path parameter to (1) comp.php, (2) diff.php, or (3) revision.php.
